title: Customer address invalid.
summary: Customer address invalid.  Team chat says postcode missing.  Fix:  Add postcode manually,  Revalidat...
steps: Customer address invalid.  Team chat says postcode missing.  Fix:  Add postcode manually,  Revalidate address,  Save and continue booking.

title: Error Code AUTH_401
summary: Error Code: AUTH_401  User not authorized to access module.  Resolution:  - Check AD group access  -...
steps: Error Code: AUTH_401  User not authorized to access module.  Resolution:  - Check AD group access  - User must be in OPS_FWD_ROLE  - Logout and login again
creator: UiPath Bot

title: Label not printing properly.
summary: Label not printing properly.  Usually printer cache issue.  Restart printer service,  Clear queue,  ...
steps: Label not printing properly.  Usually printer cache issue.  Restart printer service,  Clear queue,  Reprint label.  If still blur, change toner.
creator: UiPath Bot

steps: New staff setup steps:  ✔ Create AD account  ✔ Give email access  ✔ SAP + CW1 role  ✔ Share SOP folder  Delay usually because SAP request not approved

title: POD upload failed again
summary: POD upload failed again 😓  Error msg: “File size too large”  Just compress the image before uploadi...
steps: POD upload failed again 😓  Error msg: “File size too large”  Just compress the image before uploading.  JPEG works better than PNG.  After upload, refresh screen twice.
creator: UiPath Bot
